title: live and adventure
description: As the title suggests, this modpack focuses on leisure, retirement, and adventure. Our intention is for you to be able to build houses, cultivate farmland, or be an adventurer and enjoy life in this world.
body:
正如标题所言，这个整合包是一个主攻休闲、养老、冒险的整合包，我们的的旨意是您可以在这片世界上建造房子，开辟农田，或做个冒险家，在这片天地逍遥快活。
为了整合包的趣味性，我们在整合包里加入了Hundred Years Warfare、Ice and Fire、quark、SlashBlade: Resharped、Touhou-Little-Maid、Farmer's Delight、 Tinkers' Construct、Timeless and Classics Zero等模组，希望你玩的开心。
我们本想在整合包中加入暮色森林，但受限于版权限制，玩家们可以自行添加暮色森林游玩。
我们还移除了Quadral材质包，原因与暮色森林一致，搭配食用更佳。
本整合包加入了地形模组，电脑配置过低可能进入游戏渲染较慢，如果您的配置较差，遇到了无法渲染的问题，可以禁用“Alex的洞穴”模组，要记得点赞哦。
本整合包由code399制作、拥有并发布，遵循CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 开源许可协议，由本整合包为基础修改的整合包，必须在游戏玩家正常游玩醒目的位置写上“本整合包修改于live and adventure整合包，原作者为code399”等字样。修改的整合包同样遵守本整合包遵循的协议，最终解释权归code399所有。
Complementary Shaders - Reimagined链接：https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined
GraveStone模组链接为：https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-mod
As the title says, this integration pack focuses on leisure, retirement, and adventure. Our intention is for you to build houses, cultivate farmland, or be an adventurer, enjoying freedom in this world. To enhance your gaming experience, we have included mods such as Hundred Years Warfare, Ice and Fire, Quark, SlashBlade: Resharped, Touhou-Little-Maid, Farmer's Delight, Tinkers' Construct, Timeless, and Classics Zero in the pack, hoping you have a great time.We originally wanted to include the Twilight Forest in the mod pack, but due to copyright restrictions, players can add the Twilight Forest themselves to play.This integration pack adds a terrain module.If your configuration is poor and you encounter rendering issues, you can disable the 'Alex's Cave' mod.Remember to give a like!
We have also removed the Quadral material pack for the same reason as with the Twilight Forest; it pairs better when consumed.This integration pack is created, owned, and published by code399, following the CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 open source license agreement. Any integration packs modified based on this pack must clearly state in a prominent position during regular gameplay that "This integration pack is modified from the live and adventure integration pack, originally created by code399." Modified packs will also adhere to the agreements followed by this pack, with final interpretation rights belonging to code399.
Complementary Shaders - Reimagined link:https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined
The GraverStone mod link is: https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-mod
